title: How to access monday workflows in developer account?
excerpt:
I wanted to create Workflows integration feature. I followed the docs at https://developer.monday.com/apps/docs/how-to-create-a-workflow-block 
But how do i test this? In developer account, I do not see “Monday workflows…

posts.author: soumya (Soumya Sahu)
posts.cookedHtml:
I wanted to create Workflows integration feature. I followed the docs at https://developer.monday.com/apps/docs/how-to-create-a-workflow-block

But how do i test this? In developer account, I do not see “Monday workflows” feature enabled.

Is the only option then to test my app features is to buy an enterprise account from monday?
